title: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala
tagline: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala — spiritual town of Kerala

heroImage.alt: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala, Kerala

overview.short: St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Francis Xavier's Church is a parish of the Roman Catholic Church in Pizhala, Kerala, in the Archdiocese of Verapoly.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Pizhala
topPlaces.description: Pizhala is an island village, one among the fourteen islands of Kadamakkudy archipelago, located near to the main land of the city Ernakulam. The island is surrounded by tributaries of river Periyar.

topPlaces.name: Moolampilly
topPlaces.description: Moolampilly is an Island in Kochi surrounded by river Periyar. It is a part of Kadamakkudy grama panchyath, Kanayannur Taluk, Ernakulam District in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kothad
topPlaces.description: Kothad is an island near Kochi surrounded by river Periyar. It is a part of Kadamakkudy grama panchyath, Kanayannur Taluk, Ernakulam District in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Aster Medcity
topPlaces.description: Aster Medcity is a quaternary care healthcare centre in the city of Kochi and one of the largest in South India. It is the flagship hospital of Aster DM Healthcare, a healthcare conglomerate founded by Azad Moopen.

topPlaces.name: Chittoor Sree Krishnaswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Chittoor Sree Krishnaswamy Temple, located at South Chittoor in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India, is a temple dedicated to Lord Krishna. It is a major temple under the Cochin Devaswom Board.

topPlaces.name: Kadamakkudy Islands
topPlaces.description: Kadamakkudy Islands is an island suburb of the city of Kochi in the Indian state of Kerala. Known as the Kuttanad of Kochi, It is situated around 8 km (5 mi) north of the city centre.

topPlaces.name: South Chittoor
topPlaces.description: South Chittoor is a riverine island in the city of Kochi in Kerala, India. It is lying adjacent to Vaduthala.

topPlaces.name: Vaduthala
topPlaces.description: Vaduthala is a locality in the city of Kochi, India. It consists of the wards Vaduthala East and Vaduthala West.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (19 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (9 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala?
faq.a: Stays in St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Francis Xavier's Church, Pizhala?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pizhala, Moolampilly, Kothad, Aster Medcity, Chittoor Sree Krishnaswamy Temple.
